channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba's Harrowby Potash Mine Set to Begin Commercial Production
item.description: After nearly two decades of planning, Manitoba's only potash mine, located near the small hamlet of Harrowby in Russell-Binscarth, is set to begin commercial production in June 2026. Operated by the p...

item.title: Filipino Basketball Star Andy Gemao Joins Penn State for NCAA Division I
item.description: Andy Gemao, a standout basketball player from the Philippines, has officially committed to join Penn State University in the United States for NCAA Division I basketball. Known for his athleticism and...

item.title: US Pauses Strait of Hormuz Operations as Talks with Iran Focus on Immediate Peace
item.description: In May 2026, the United States temporarily paused its naval escorts through the Strait of Hormuz after diplomatic efforts led by Pakistan gained momentum. President Donald Trump announced the halt, ci...

item.title: Stellantis and Leapmotor to produce EVs together in Spain
item.description: Stellantis, the Franco-Italian carmaker, and Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer Leapmotor are set to deepen their collaboration beyond a commercial partnership by introducing manufacturing in Europ...

item.title: Lt Gen N S Raja Subramani Appointed as India’s Chief of Defence Staff
item.description: The Government of India has officially appointed Lieutenant General N S Raja Subramani (Retd.) as the country’s next Chief of Defence Staff (CDS), according to a formal announcement made on Friday. He...

item.title: NDC Aspirants Say Peter Obi Must Deliver for Nigerians or Face Accountability
item.description: Some House of Representatives aspirants for the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) don warn say former Anambra State Governor, Peter Obi, go dey accountable if e become president for 2027. During one p...

item.title: Trump anticipates Iranian peace proposal amid new sanctions on military suppliers
item.description: President Donald Trump has stated that he expects a peace proposal from Iranian leaders imminently, coinciding with the United States imposing sanctions on ten major suppliers involved in providing dr...

item.title: Top five Canberra mobile speed camera locations and fines from 2020-2025
item.description: An analysis of mobile speed camera data in Canberra has revealed the five locations that generated the highest revenue from speeding fines between 2020 and 2025. The Monaro Highway near Hume roadworks...

item.title: Pico Iyer on Travel, Cultural Experiences and the Value of Stillness
item.description: Pico Iyer, renowned essayist and travel writer of Indian origin, shared his reflections on travel, culture, and the importance of stillness in a conversation with Scroll. Having grown up across Indian...

item.title: Concerns Over Surrogacy Practices and Child Welfare in Australia
item.description: This article examines the ethical and legal challenges surrounding surrogacy in Australia, highlighting cases where commercial surrogacy arrangements overseas have led to distressing outcomes for both...

item.title: Premier Smith emphasises collaboration with Ottawa to address Alberta concerns
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith emphasised the importance of cooperation with Ottawa as separatist sentiment rises in the province. Speaking at the Canada Strong and Free conference in Ottawa, Smith no...

item.title: Retired IGPs and Top Police Officers Declare Interest for 2027 Elections
item.description: Two retired Inspector Generals of Police, Mohammed Abubakar Adamu and Usman Alkali Baba, don announce say dem wan run for governorship for their respective states, Nasarawa and Yobe. Dem dey use their...

item.title: Ann Kananu Mourns Mother’s Passing Amid Heavy Medical Bills
item.description: Former Nairobi governor Ann Kananu is mourning the loss of her mother who passed away on May 4 after a prolonged illness. In a heartfelt tribute, Kananu described her mother as a strong pillar who alw...

item.title: House of Representatives set to forward VP Sara's impeachment case to Senate next week
item.description: House Representative Chua announced that the House of Representatives is preparing to transmit the impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte to the Senate anytime next week. This step follo...

item.title: Russia scales down Victory Day parade amid temporary Ukraine ceasefire
item.description: Moscow has announced that it will hold a scaled-back Victory Day parade on May 9, 2026, coinciding with a temporary three-day truce in the ongoing war in Ukraine. The ceasefire, brokered by US Preside...

item.title: Yukii Takahashi shares experience collaborating with JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith
item.description: In a recent interview, actress Yukii Takahashi opened up about her experience working with fellow actors JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith. She highlighted that both JM and Fyang bring a refreshing and unique...

item.title: TMG warns against Pantami’s remarks on 2027 elections as threat to democracy
item.description: The Transition Monitoring Group (TMG), one of Nigeria’s respected election observer bodies, don express serious concern over comments wey former Minister of Communication and Digital Economy, Isa Pant...

item.title: Persistent Xenophobic Violence in South Africa Highlights Governance Gaps
item.description: The African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights has highlighted a recurring pattern of violence against African migrants in South Africa, noting dates of significant incidents in 1998, 2008, 2009,...

item.title: Calgary to experience scattered showers and partly sunny skies over the weekend
item.description: Calgary residents can expect a weekend of variable weather conditions, with isolated showers interspersed with periods of sun and cloud. Meteorologists indicate that the showers will be light and spor...

item.title: Craig Bellamy addresses health concerns while reflecting on Storm’s challenges
item.description: Melbourne Storm coach Craig Bellamy has opened up to the media for the first time since being diagnosed with a neurodegenerative disorder last month, though he remains private about the specifics of h...
